label: Screen context • Xcode navigator file rows + commit hash dropped, code leads
notes: Faithful version of the original bug: Xcode's Project Navigator rows are editable 'textfield's whose value is a bare file name, and the blame gutter shows a commit hash. Those are sidebar chrome — the focused editor's code must lead via 'Viewing:' and the unlabeled single-token file names + hash must NOT appear in 'On screen'.
